message:
fix(clippy): resolve 8 additional clippy warnings with subprocess-bridge feature

Fix clippy warnings that appear when building with --features subprocess-bridge:

- Unnest or-patterns in tui/app.rs key handling
- Suppress dead_code for streaming SSE handler delegates (web.rs)
- Box large Event variant in WaitResult::Matched (event_stream.rs)
- Add missing Eq derives for McpClientToolDefinition, McpClientContentItem
- Allow unused_self on tx_execution determine_final_outcome
- Allow needless_pass_by_ref_mut on runtime config_take_update (tokio API requires &mut)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
